---
title: "Procedure"
---

[← Back to Lab 2 overview](index.qmd)

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
**Working draft.** Procedure being refined as the lab is run this quarter.
:::

## Pre-Lab Preparation

_TBD_

## Field Session

_TBD — for each of experiments A (Baseline), B (FF), C (Tuned), and for both the speed and yaw-rate loops, the sequence of step inputs and the parameter changes between cases._

## Quality Check (Before Leaving the Field)

_TBD — what to confirm in the timeseries plot before deciding the dataset is good enough to keep._
